ai.issueType: CustomButton component uses non-interactive div element
ai.description: The CustomButton component renders a div element with an onClick handler. Div elements are not focusable or keyboard accessible, blocking keyboard users from activating the button. Screen readers will not announce this as a button.

ai.issueType: Navigation menu button missing aria-controls attribute
ai.description: The toggle button does not reference the controlled menu region via aria-controls, making it difficult for screen reader users to identify the relationship between the button and the content it controls.

ai.issueType: Tab button missing id attribute
ai.description: The tab buttons are missing id attributes, which are required to support the aria-labelledby reference on the tabpanel elements at line 139. This breaks the programmatic association between tabs and their panels.

ai.issueType: Tab button missing aria-controls attribute
ai.description: The tab buttons lack aria-controls attributes to identify which tabpanel they control. This prevents screen readers from announcing the relationship between the tab and its content panel.

ai.issueType: Tabpanel element missing id attribute
ai.description: The tabpanel divs are missing id attributes, which are needed for the aria-controls reference on the tab buttons to point to a valid target.

ai.issueType: Tabpanel references non-existent id in aria-labelledby
ai.description: The aria-labelledby attribute references `tab-${tab.id}`, but the tab buttons do not have corresponding id attributes. This creates a broken reference that prevents screen readers from calculating the accessible name for the tabpanel.

ai.issueType: Modal Escape key handler does not execute close action
ai.description: The keyboard event handler for the Escape key contains an empty code block and does not call onClose(). Keyboard users cannot close the modal using the Escape key, trapping them in the dialog.

ai.issueType: Dropdown toggle button missing aria-expanded attribute
ai.description: The button toggles the dropdown listbox visibility but lacks aria-expanded to communicate the expanded/collapsed state to screen reader users.

ai.issueType: Dropdown toggle button missing aria-controls attribute
ai.description: The dropdown toggle button does not reference the listbox element via aria-controls, making it difficult for assistive technology users to identify the controlled element.

ai.issueType: Dropdown listbox missing id attribute
ai.description: The listbox element lacks an id attribute, preventing aria-controls on the toggle button from referencing it.

ai.issueType: Dropdown option elements not keyboard accessible
ai.description: The dropdown options are rendered as li elements with onClick handlers but are not focusable or operable via keyboard. Users cannot select options using Enter, Space, or arrow keys.

ai.issueType: Textarea missing aria-describedby and aria-invalid for errors
ai.description: The textarea displays validation errors but lacks aria-describedby to associate the error message and aria-invalid to indicate the invalid state. Screen reader users are not informed when the field contains an error.

ai.issueType: Input missing aria-describedby and aria-invalid for errors
ai.description: The input element displays validation errors but lacks aria-describedby to associate the error message and aria-invalid to indicate the invalid state. Screen reader users are not informed when the field contains an error.

ai.issueType: Form error message span missing id attribute
ai.description: The error message span lacks an id attribute, which is required for aria-describedby on the input to reference it. Without this, the association between error text and input field is broken.

ai.issueType: Email input missing autocomplete attribute
ai.description: The input field with type="email" collects email addresses but lacks the autocomplete="email" attribute. This prevents browsers and assistive technologies from automatically filling the field, reducing efficiency for users with cognitive or motor disabilities.

ai.issueType: Name input missing autocomplete attribute
ai.description: The input field collecting the user's full name (name="name") lacks the autocomplete="name" attribute, preventing automatic filling and reducing accessibility for users who rely on autofill.

ai.issueType: Telephone input missing autocomplete attribute
ai.description: The input field with type="tel" collects telephone numbers but lacks the autocomplete="tel" attribute. This prevents automatic filling of the phone number for assistive technology users.

ai.issueType: Cart toggle button missing aria-expanded attribute
ai.description: The button toggles the visibility of the shopping cart modal but lacks aria-expanded to indicate whether the cart is currently displayed or hidden.

ai.issueType: Cart toggle button missing aria-controls attribute
ai.description: The cart toggle button does not reference the modal container via aria-controls. Additionally, the Modal component at line 116 should expose an id prop or use a static id="cart-modal" to be referenced.

ai.issueType: LoadingSpinner missing status role
ai.description: The loading indicator is not announced to screen reader users because it lacks role="status" or an aria-live region. Users are not informed when content is loading.

ai.issueType: LoadingSpinner animation missing reduced motion support
ai.description: The CSS animation spins continuously without respecting prefers-reduced-motion. Users with vestibular disorders may experience discomfort from the spinning animation.

ai.issueType: Navigation landmark missing accessible name
ai.description: The <nav> element lacks an aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute. When multiple navigation landmarks exist, or to provide context, a label is required to distinguish this region for assistive technology users.

ai.issueType: Menu toggle button missing state and relationship attributes
ai.description: The button toggles the visibility of the menu list but lacks aria-expanded to indicate the current state and aria-controls to associate it with the menu container. Screen reader users will not know if the menu is open or closed.

ai.issueType: Form validation logic does not update aria-invalid
ai.description: The handleSubmit function sets visual error states in the errors object but does not set aria-invalid="true" on the corresponding input fields. Screen reader users are not informed that the field is invalid programmatically.

ai.issueType: Form error message not associated with input
ai.description: The error message <span> is visually present but not programmatically linked to the input field via aria-describedby. Screen reader users will not hear the error message when focusing the input.

ai.issueType: Section landmark missing accessible name (Welcome)
ai.description: The <section> element lacks an aria-label. Multiple sections on a page require distinct labels to allow assistive technology users to navigate between them meaningfully.

ai.issueType: Section landmark missing accessible name (Contact Us)
ai.description: The <section> element lacks an aria-label. Multiple sections on a page require distinct labels to allow assistive technology users to navigate between them meaningfully.

ai.issueType: Section landmark missing accessible name (Filter Products)
ai.description: The <section> element lacks an aria-label. Multiple sections on a page require distinct labels to allow assistive technology users to navigate between them meaningfully.

ai.issueType: Section landmark missing accessible name (Products)
ai.description: The <section> element lacks an aria-label. Multiple sections on a page require distinct labels to allow assistive technology users to navigate between them meaningfully.
